Interface DRITemplateDesign<T>

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractTemplateDesign, JasperEmptyTemplateDesign, JasperTemplateDesign
public interface DRITemplateDesign<T> extends Serializable

DRITemplateDesign interface.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
